channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: CSIS Names Ambassador Edgard Kagan Freeman Chair in China Studies
item.description: The Center for Strategic and International Studies today announced that Ambassador (ret.) Edgard D. Kagan has joined CSIS as the Freeman Chair in China Studies.

item.title: Saving Subic: Strategic Infrastructure, Development Finance, and the Limits of U.S. Economic Statecraft
item.description: When a top global shipyard in the Philippines went bankrupt, key gaps in the U.S. tool kit were exposed. This report details how the U.S. relied on private and allied partners to counter China and offers recommendations to better secure strategic infrastructure abroad.

item.title: Reinforce, Don’t Reopen: Why Digital Trade Matters in the 2026 USMCA Review
item.description: CSIS Americas Fellow Diego Marroquin Bitar analyzes the current North American digital trade framework ahead of the 2026 USMCA free trade agreement joint review.
